data.title: Stablecoin payment volumes on Revolut soar 156% in 2025. Most transfers fall in $100-$500 range, with customers using for medium-sized payments.
data.description: A significant number of stablecoin transfers fall within the $100 to $500 range, indicating that Revolut customers frequently utilize stablecoins for usual medium-sized transactions.

data.title: Research reveals hydrogen interaction with silicon defects creates free electrons, revolutionizing IGBT efficiency.
data.description: In Tokyo, Mitsubishi Electric Corporation, Institute of Science Tokyo, University of Tsukuba, and Quemix Corporation revealed a groundbreaking finding: they have successfully uncovered the process by which hydrogen generates free electrons by interacting with specific defects in silicon. This marks the world’s first elucidation of this phenomenon. The breakthrough holds significant promise for enhancing the design and production of insulated gate bipolar transistors (IGBTs), potentially boosting their efficiency and lowering power loss. The collaboration has opened new avenues for innovation in this field.

data.title: Fujifilm launches instax mini Link+ Smartphone Printer with enhanced features, new print modes - Business Wire.
data.description: VALHALLA, N.Y. - FUJIFILM North America Corporation, Imaging Division, has unveiled the latest addition to its instax mini Link smartphone printer series - the instax mini Link+™ (mini Link+). This innovative smartphone printer1 is equipped with enhanced instant photo technology and seamlessly integrates with the downloadable instax mini Link™ app. The app offers new features focused on inspiration, impact, and imagination, including upgraded print modes to enhance photo capture.

data.title: Fujifilm debuts instax mini Evo Cinema™ camera for personalized content with photos, 15-second videos; 3-in-1 design.
data.description: In Valhalla, N.Y., FUJIFILM North America Corporation, Imaging Division, has unveiled the new instax mini Evo Cinema™ hybrid instant camera. This innovative camera allows users to create personalized content using still photos, 15-second video clips, and instax™ mini photo prints through the instax mini Evo™ smartphone app. The 3-in-1 camera offers a dynamic and customizable experience for users.

data.title: Conscientia Health named "Best Psychiatrist" in Red Bank, NJ based on Google Reviews, reflecting community trust and recognition.
data.description: In Red Bank, N.J., Conscientia Health has been honored as the top psychiatry practice, voted by patients on Google Reviews. This recognition as the "Best Psychiatrist" highlights the trust and appreciation from the local community. The award signifies the high regard for Conscientia's services among patients.

data.title: BriaCell Therapeutics prices public offering of 5,366,726 units at $5.59 each, raising $30 million. Warrants to trade on Nasdaq.
data.description: BriaCell Therapeutics Corp. has announced the pricing of a public offering of 5,366,726 units, each priced at $5.59, for a total gross proceeds of approximately $30 million. Each unit consists of one common share or pre-funded warrant and one warrant. The Warrants will be listed on the Nasdaq Capital Market under the symbol “BCTXL” and will have an exercise price of $6.93, expiring five years from the issuance date. The common shares and warrants must be purchased together in the offering but will be issued separately.

data.title: FTX sets record date for next distribution on Feb 14, 2026, with distribution date on March 31, 2026. Disputed claims reserve reduced by over $2B.
data.description: The next distribution record date has been scheduled for February 14, 2026, with the distribution set to take place on March 31, 2026. An amended notice was filed on January 13, 2026, in Wilmington, Del., by FTX Trading Ltd. (doing business as FTX.com) and the FTX Recovery Trust to reduce disputed claims reserve by over $2 billion.

data.title: GOFO delivered 100M+ packages in 2025, no fee hike for 2026. Annual Review confirmed.
data.description: In the recently published 2025 Annual Review (PDF) by GOFO, a tech-driven last-mile logistics company based in Los Angeles, it was disclosed that they achieved a significant feat by successfully transporting over 100 million packages throughout the United States in the same year. This accomplishment marks a major milestone for the company in terms of their delivery operations within the country.

data.title: Warren urges delay on World Liberty bank bid until Trump ends ties due to major financial conflicts and corruption concern.
data.description: Senator Elizabeth Warren expressed shock at the unprecedented level of financial conflicts and corruption surrounding US President Donald Trump's association with World Liberty Financial. She emphasized that the scale of the alleged impropriety was unmatched, indicating the seriousness of the situation. This revelation has raised concerns about potential unethical practices and questionable dealings, prompting further scrutiny into Trump's ties to the organization. Warren's statement underscores the gravity of the situation, highlighting the need for thorough investigation and transparency in addressing the alleged issues.
